```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement database ETL pipeline for data warehousing"
---
# Database ETL
## Task
Build ETL pipeline from operational to analytical database.
## Requirements
1. Extract data from source databases. 2. Transform data (clean, join, aggregate).
3. Load into data warehouse. 4. Schedule ETL runs.
5. Monitor pipeline health and data quality.
## Constraints
- Idempotent loads. Track data lineage. Monitor data quality. Handle source changes.
## Success Criteria
- ETL runs reliably. Data quality maintained. Pipeline monitored. Changes handled.
```
